    - [Examples](https://github.com/corkami/pics/blob/master/binary/basics/examples)

# Charsets and encodings

[Permalink: Charsets and encodings](https://github.com/corkami/pics/blob/master/binary/README.md#charsets-and-encodings)

- ASCII American Standard Code for Information Interchange (1967)
  - [printable ASCII](https://github.com/corkami/pics/blob/master/binary/charsets/ASCIIprintable.png)
  - [complete](https://github.com/corkami/pics/blob/master/binary/charsets/ASCII.png)
- Code Pages
  - [IBM PC cp437](https://github.com/corkami/pics/blob/master/binary/charsets/ASCII-DOS.png)
  - [Icelandic cp861, Denmark/Norway cp865, Greek cp737 Windows-1252](https://github.com/corkami/pics/blob/master/binary/charsets/codepages2.png)
  - [Central European cp852, KOI8-R](https://github.com/corkami/pics/blob/master/binary/charsets/codepages1.png)
- [EBCDIC](https://github.com/corkami/pics/blob/master/binary/charsets/EBCDIC.png): Extended Binary Coded Decimal Interchange Code (1964)

- [APL](https://github.com/corkami/pics/blob/master/binary/charsets/apl0293.png): A Programming Language - EBCDIC CodePage 293 (1966)

- [PETSCII](https://github.com/corkami/pics/blob/master/binary/charsets/PETSCII.png) \- PET Standard Code of Information Interchange / CBM ASCII (1977-)


* * *

# File formats

[Permalink: File formats](https://github.com/corkami/pics/blob/master/binary/README.md#file-formats)

Containers:

- IFF: EA Interchange File Format (1985)
- RIFF: Resource Interchange File Format (1991)
- CFBF/CDFv2: Compound file binary format / Composite Document file v2 (DOCFILE / D0CF11E) (1997-2004)
- EBML: Extensible Binary Meta Language (2002)
- ISOBMFF: ISO Base Media File Format (2004?)

  - [256 colors](https://github.com/corkami/pics/blob/master/binary/pcx256.png)
